epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: ILAE criteria; EEG and MRI commonly used; surgical workup for drug-resistant focal epilepsy

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate to high with access to specialist care and epilepsy surgery programs

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: High access to EEG/MRI and specialist epilepsy services in many member states
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Broad ASM access; structured pathways for drug-resistant epilepsy including surgery and neuromodulation
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong specialist networks and advanced epilepsy care infrastructure in many systems
